series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Organized Crime Investigative Commission (OOCIC) Meeting Minutes
series_metadata.series_description: Documents official commission meetings with motions and official actions of the Ohio Organized Crime Investigative Commission (OOCIC).

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Microform: If microfilmed, permanently. ; Paper: If in paper, permanently, unless microfilmed. ; Electronic: permanently, unless printed or microfilmed
retention_rules.disposition_method: Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
